github_repos.snippet: Keep your swimming pool safe and crystal clear by monitoring up to 25 water chemistry parameters at a glance.

github_repos.title: DOI-USGS/EGRET
github_repos.snippet: An R-package for the analysis of long-term changes in water quality and streamflow, including the water-quality method Weighted Regressions on Time, Discharge, and Season (WRTDS). https://doi-usgs.git

github_repos.title: KnowFlow/KnowFlow_AWM
github_repos.snippet: KnowFlow Automatic Water Monitoring device is an open sourced tool enable everyone having access to first hand water quality data with low cost.

podcast: [Kleptotherms] In this episode, we break the thermometer and watch the mercury spill out as we discover that temperature is far stranger than it seems. We first ran this episode in 2021: Five stories that run the gamut from snakes to stars. We start out underwater, with a species of snake that has evolved a devious trick for keeping warm.
